org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class DpeRegistrationData

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.DpeRegistrationData

  • public class DpeRegistrationData
extends java.lang.Object
    The registration data of a running DPE.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<ContainerRegistrationData> containers()
      Gets all the containers running on the DPE.
      java.lang.String ersapHome()
      Gets the local value of the $ERSAP_HOME environment variable used by the DPE.
      long memorySize()
      Gets the maximum amount of memory available to the DPE.
      DpeName name()
      Gets the ERSAP canonical name.
      int numCores()
      Gets the maximum number of cores assigned to the DPE.
      java.lang.String session()
      Gets the session used by the DPE to publish reports.
      java.lang.String startedBy()
      Gets an identification of who started the DPE.
      java.time.LocalDateTime startTime()
      Gets the local time when the DPE was started.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • name

        public DpeName name()
        Gets the ERSAP canonical name.
        Returns:
        the canonical name

      • startTime

        public java.time.LocalDateTime startTime()
        Gets the local time when the DPE was started.
        Returns:
        the start time of the DPE

      • startedBy

        public java.lang.String startedBy()
        Gets an identification of who started the DPE.
        Returns:
        the author that started the DPE

      • ersapHome

        public java.lang.String ersapHome()
        Gets the local value of the $ERSAP_HOME environment variable used by the DPE.
        Returns:
        the local path of the ERSAP installation for the DPE

      • session

        public java.lang.String session()
        Gets the session used by the DPE to publish reports.
        Returns:
        the session ID of the DPE

      • numCores

        public int numCores()
        Gets the maximum number of cores assigned to the DPE.
        Returns:
        the number of cores the can be used by the DPE.

      • memorySize

        public long memorySize()
        Gets the maximum amount of memory available to the DPE.
        Returns:
        the maximum amount of memory that the DPE will attempt to use, measured in bytes

      • containers

        public java.util.Set<ContainerRegistrationData> containers()
        Gets all the containers running on the DPE.
        Returns:
        the registration data of the containers
